2.q: A bioinformatic analysis using local BLAST searches of the W. ichthyophaga draft genome identified another copy of a HOG1-like gene [WiHog1B, distinct from WiHog1A].

3.q: characterisation of its two Hog1-like kinases: WiHog1A and WiHog1B... conﬁrm the existence of the HOG signalling pathway and its role in osmosensing in this halophilic fungus.
